name: An opinionated list of Python frameworks, libraries, tools, and resources
description: An opinionated list of Python frameworks, libraries, tools, and resources

links.title: django-ai-plugins
links.description: Django backend agent skills for Django, DRF, Celery, and Django-specific code review.

links.title: graphify
links.description: Turn any folder of code, SQL schemas, docs, papers, images, or videos into a queryable knowledge graph.
